title: Origins: Panda Chen
description: Panda Chen is a Wanderer, Adventurer and a Fighter, and this world-class Bamboo Master has left an indelible mark in the history.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in newest version of origin, so for lower versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

# Panda Chen
**Panda Chen is a Wanderer, Adventurer and a Fighter, and this world-class Bamboo Master has left an indelible mark in the history.**

## Core System
- 🐼Raw Power
  - Your ability consume hungers. It will consume health instead if no hungers.

## Core Survival Power
- 🐼Panda Defense
  - You won't get defense normaly, instead you will recieve resistance level base on how many armor you are wearing.
- 🐼Bamboo Leap
  - Using (Primary Active) on ground, you can stack up with bamboo. Cost Hunger. Cost Health if no hunger.
- 🐼Panda
  - As a Panda, you dont like using weapon other than bamboo. and you only like to eat(only able to use food).
- 🐼Ride Off
  - You always jump high when un-ride anything. You immue to fall damage.

## Core Fighting Power

- 🐼Bamboo style
  - When holding a bamboo in main hand, You will recieve +2 {Attack Damage} and recieve 20% {Movement Speed} when sprinting. Every time you attack with bamboo, you will recieve +1 {Attack Damage}. Reset when didn't attack for 10 seconds.
- 🐼Bamboo Sweep
  - Using (Secondary Active), you can sweep attack target around, and knockback them. Cost Hunger. Cost Health if no hunger.
